rationale: PR delivers all six v16 features in a single index.html (single-file SPA pattern). Invoice photo uploads: new entryInvoices file input (accept='image/*' multiple), .invoice-preview and .invoice-thumb CSS, handleInvoiceSelect JS handler, 📎 icon in entry log, image resize-to-800px-max plus JPEG quality 60% compression for localStorage budget. Required Note: entryNote input gains the `required` attribute, label drops '(optional)' suffix, and submit handler hard-blocks with `if (!noteVal) { toast('Note is required.'); return; }`. Chime Payments tab: new <button class='tab-btn' onclick="switchTab('chime')"> entry plus full tab-content div with chimeSummaryStrip, chimeBarChart canvas, period-selector buttons (Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Quarterly) wiring setChimePeriod(), manual transaction form, and CSV import drop zone with auto-categorization. Money Received removal: auto-removes legacy entries from financeTypes on load. Expense-only finance: form title and dropdown filtered to expense types. Period-based Job Revenue: Breakdown grid filters by selected period range. Implementation is exhaustive single-file vanilla JS; the body honestly discloses localStorage-only persistence and the no-public-Chime-API constraint. No tests in this project type, but the in-code validation (toast on empty note) is real, not a stub.
